description:
You are a building envelope engineer investigating peak solar heat gain. The Energy3D project 'building_shape.ng3' is open. Perform the following study:

1. Place at least 3 Light Sensors on the exterior of the building. Distribute them across distinctly different surfaces (e.g., roof, South wall, East/West wall).
2. Change the simulation date to the Summer Solstice (June 21).
3. Run a Daily Environmental Simulation to log the irradiance data.
4. Open the Sensor Data graph/plot to view the diurnal curves for the placed sensors.
5. Take a screenshot showing the populated sensor graph and save it exactly as '~/Documents/Energy3D/sensor_graph.png'.
6. Save the modified 3D model project as '~/Documents/Energy3D/facade_sensors.ng3'.
